response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-leading C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and organizing technical workshops
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems across multiple domains
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
